task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the Aura_Next LEO spacecraft with the correct Semi-Major Axis.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a spacecraft named 'Aura_Next' in the GMAT Resources tree or a configuration window showing its SMA set to 7083.14 km.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the three TDRS GEO relay spacecraft.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for three spacecraft named 'TDRS_East', 'TDRS_West', and 'TDRS_Z' in the GMAT Resources tree or script editor.

task_completion.description: Verify the ContactLocator is configured with the correct target, observers, and occulting body.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a ContactLocator configuration window or script block showing 'Aura_Next' as the Target, the three TDRS satellites as Observers, and 'Earth' listed under Occulting Bodies.

task_completion.description: Verify the mission sequence is set to propagate for 1 ElapsedDay.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Propagate command in the GMAT Mission tree or script editor with a stopping condition set to 1 ElapsedDay (e.g., 'Aura_Next.ElapsedDays = 1').

task_completion.description: Verify the GMAT script is saved to the correct directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a file manager, terminal window, or GMAT title bar showing the script saved as 'tdrss_sim.script' in the '/home/ga/Documents/missions/' directory.

task_completion.description: Verify the ContactLocator report is generated and saved to the correct path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a file manager, terminal window, or text editor showing the existence or contents of 'tdrss_access_report.txt' in the '/home/ga/GMAT_output/' directory.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used GMAT to create the simulation and generate the report.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots showing the GMAT GUI open with the mission configured, or the agent actively writing and running a GMAT script (.script) via the GMAT application/CLI.

integrity.description: Verify the generated report looks like a genuine GMAT ContactLocator output.
integrity.visual_evidence: If the report is visible, it should contain standard GMAT formatting such as headers for 'Target', 'Observer', 'Start Time', 'Stop Time', and 'Duration', rather than manually typed plain text.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not simply create a fake text file with the expected report name without running a simulation.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for evidence of the GMAT run executing (e.g., GMAT message window showing 'Mission run completed' or terminal output from a GMAT headless run) prior to the report file appearing.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Spacecraft: Aura_Next (SMA: 7083.14 km). Observer Spacecraft: TDRS_East, TDRS_West, TDRS_Z (SMA: 42164.17 km). Expected Script Path: /home/ga/Documents/missions/tdrss_sim.script. Expected Report Path: /home/ga/GMAT_output/tdrss_access_report.txt.
